subcodes.first_line: O cherished handmaiden of God! Thou didst write about the gathering. Such a feast is most beloved, for it causeth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای کنیز عزیز الهی از میهمانی مرقوم نموده بودی ضیافت بسیار محبوب زیرا سبب
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @true liberty; freedom, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @permission for visit; pilgrimage
